description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a collared shirt layered over a long-sleeve undershirt and paired with straight-cut pants. He wears a crossbody bag slung from his left shoulder to his right hip, adding a practical accessory to his outfit. His footwear consists of athletic sneakers, suitable for walking in city environments. The figure has a full beard and a medium-length, slightly tousled hairstyle. His arms are relaxed and slightly extended outward, and his overall build is average and proportionate. The clothing and accessories suggest a modern, everyday pedestrian commonly seen in urban settings.
description: A casually dressed adult male with a crossbody bag, sneakers, and a full beard, standing in a relaxed pose. He wears layered clothing suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the facial features, crossbody bag, layered shirt, and sneakers clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the bag's strap, and the relaxed arm posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the bag strap across the back, and the straight fit of the pants.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the opposite profile, the bag's body, and the side seam of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: casual collared shirt over a long-sleeve undershirt with straight-cut pants and a crossbody bag
